executionNotes: Task-based flow validator launches failed because the configured custom model resolved to invalid model custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3, so the main validator executed the equivalent browser flows directly and wrote the flow reports itself.

Canvas/WebGL-heavy surfaces (entity graph, trend chart, geopolitical arcs) required DOM-assisted inspection or the app’s own live selection handlers to verify the resulting user-visible panels and state.
